description_long: This is a modern, angular house with a flat, multi-faceted roof and a combination of concrete and wood panel exterior walls. The front features large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious patio with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an outdoor seating area. The house includes a covered carport and a separate wooden structure, likely a garage or storage shed, connected by a gravel driveway. The rear and sides of the house are more private, with smaller windows and wooden fencing providing enclosure. The landscaping is minimal, with the house set on a raised green plot and paved walkways leading to the entrances. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern house with a flat, angular roof, large glass windows, wood and concrete exterior, a pool, and a carport, set on a landscaped green plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, patio with pool, lounge area, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the carport, wooden garage, gravel driveway, and more private window arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the main entry path, wooden fencing, and the angular roof structure.
description_view_3: Side view showing the pool, sun loungers, and the secondary entrance with minimal windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows at the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, no steps, and a covered patio with direct access to the outdoor living area.
